roa.docketEntryComment: DEF ATC TO RECALL BW FILED
SIGNED ORDER RE REMOVAL GPS/HOME DETENTION/ELECTRONIC MONITORING FILED
REMOVAL OF SCRAM IS ORDERED, SIGNED AND FILED TODAY

/TWS/CH2:PROB  5 Y:PJ  120D/CTS:42/ADPRS1:3-6-14/CTORD:REMAINDER OF SENTENCE MAY BE SERVED THROUGH HOME DETENTION OR ELECTRONIC  MONITORING/CTORD:SCRAM DEVICE IS VACATED/COMUN:240/CCC:COUNTS 2 & 3/RESTV/X: AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLE MOVE TO DISMISS  COUNT(S) 1 & 4 PURSUANT TO PC 1385,/MO GRTD/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY RESTITUTION OR OTHER MATTERS RESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGES  MAY BE ADDED AS TERMSAND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN  COUNT(S) 2 & 3,/HEARFIND/PF525 18/MOP1/LREG/IID:2/LVAL/LCHEM/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/4019/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGHFULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF/

/CAL:PROOF OF SCRAM/X:SCRAM WAS SHWON TO THE PEOPLE,/CTORD:COUNSEL'S ORALREQUEST FOR GPS REMOVAL IS DENIED,/X:TRIAL ON 01-28-19 & TRIAL READINESSIN D13 ARE CONFIRMED,/X:DEFENDANT IS ON 2 HOURS STANDBY/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR:02-14-19/987,2/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL ELECTRONIC MONITORINGBY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS AND SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THERECORD AND BY THE SFSD,/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:PROOFOF SCRAM/DOP/CONTD:TRIAL READINESS/DEF:IS ON TWO HOUR STANDBY/CONTD:JURYTRIAL/DEF:IS ON TWO HOUR STANDBY/
/CAL:PHC ON APD MTR/DAWT/MTR-DA-APD/DEFT ADV/DEFT ADM VIO/REVSA:05-28-19//REIN ORIG TC/PROB EXT: 02-07-24/
/CAL:MOTION TO RECALL BW/BWR:05-15-19/BWR1/09    CTS APD MTR/WIAMTR/S17/PROB ADM REV/CONTD:PHC APD MTR/DOPU:APD/
/CAL:APD MTR FILING/X:MOTION TO REVOKE PROBATION-APD - GRANTED/FTA/BWI/PROB ADM REV/ /BAIL:7500/
/CAL:PLEA/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:2 & 3/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
